title: Predicting LLM Safety Before Release by Simulating Deployment
summary: Predicting LLM Safety Before Release by Simulating Deployment
whyItMatters: Paper link Before releasing a new model, labs need to understand not just what it can do, but how it is likely to behave in real-world use, including where it might introduce new risks.
